description: Unexpected system failure during guest stay
mitigation_strategy: Bi-weekly system checks and maintenance reserve; Neutralization Artifact: Signed PM Completion Log
trigger_event: Two repair tickets in same system within 30 days

mitigation_strategy: Execute launch promo stack and listing optimization; Neutralization Artifact: First 5 Verified 5-Star Reviews
